response.original_title: Akina Nakamori 80's Best Performance on NHK
response.overview: Another trajectory of Akina Nakamori since her debut in 1982. Performance footage from NHK programs in the 1980s featuring Akina has been digitally remastered and revived on Blu-ray. Since her debut in 1982, Akina Nakamori has captivated many people with her overwhelming singing ability and expressive power, becoming one of Japan's representative singers. Numerous performances from NHK music programs in which she appeared, including "NHK Kohaku Uta Gassen," "Let's Go Young," "Young Studio 101," "The 27th Record Festival Kayou Taikai," "Idol Dai Kyoen," and "Omoikkiri Studio 101," have been digitally remastered by the NEP Video Restore Service and are newly released on Blu-ray. A total of 119 songs are included in the video footage. A total of 8 songs of previously unreleased or never-before-distributed footage are also included. Extremely rare footage includes collaborations with Naoko Kawai and cover songs of Toshihiko Tahara, Yosui Inoue, and Hideko Takamine.
response.title: Akina Nakamori 80's Best Performance on NHK
